signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved into flush territory, so I would rather wait for a bounce than force a new short here.
LIT remains one of the cleaner shorts because the tape is weak and fresh shorts are still pressing while open interest continues to build.
DASH is already deep into a flush and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
BABY has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the tape too fragile to justify forcing a long.
BLUR also has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor to trust for a serious fresh long.
MERL is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
WLD is the only real long candidate on this board because it is still trend-supported with price and open interest rising together, but confidence stays modest in this macro tape.
ZEN is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
MET is already in a flush state and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
